About.storyP1: Born from a passion for crafting exceptional living environments, XPRESS DESIGN has grown for over a decade. We don't only build houses — we create bespoke works of art that carry each homeowner's signature.
About.storyP2: Our design philosophy balances contemporary aesthetics with optimal function. Through luxury minimalism, we believe true elegance comes from refinement, material quality and meticulous architectural detail.
About.storyP3: Our journey is one of relentless creativity, always putting client satisfaction and long-term resilience of every project first.
About.visionText: To be Vietnam's leading architecture and interior brand, recognised for bold creativity and international-quality standards in the premium real-estate segment.
About.missionText: To create spaces not merely to inhabit, but to honour human value. We deliver intelligent design, deep personalisation and lasting quality over time.
About.valueCreativityDesc: Constantly innovating and pushing boundaries in design.
About.valueQualityDesc: Finest materials and rigorous quality control at every step.
About.valueCareDesc: Listening closely to even the smallest wishes of our clients.
About.valueTrustDesc: On-time delivery and transparency across every phase.
About.teamHeading: Our architects — the people behind the difference
About.team1Desc: Over 15 years designing villas and premium penthouses.
About.team2Desc: A spatial storyteller with refined taste, focused on minimalist style.
About.team3Desc: Expert in technical solutions and modern construction delivery.
About.ctaBody: Reach out to XPRESS DESIGN for thoughtful support from our professional architect team.

Projects.heroTitle:
A collection of spaces
crafted with artistry
Projects.heroSubtitle: Each project tells a unique story where we blend minimal architectural language with thoughtful function.
Projects.problemTitle: The challenge of stillness within the city.
Projects.implementationDescription: We create a sequence of open spaces that balance function, materiality and natural light. Every detail is resolved to guide the living experience, from daily routines to quiet moments of retreat.
Projects.resultQuote: More than a physical architectural work, it becomes a meditative piece of living art — a legacy for the homeowner.

ServicesPage.overviewTitle: Real value, drawn into every set of plans
ServicesPage.overviewBody: At XPRESS DESIGN we offer a closed-loop service ecosystem — from consulting and architecture to interiors and turnkey construction. With a dedicated architect team, we deliver work that meets rigorous technical standards and reaches for the art of living.
ServicesPage.faqIntro: We gathered the questions clients ask most often, so you can understand how XPRESS DESIGN works.
ServicesPage.faqQuote: “Client satisfaction is not only the final outcome — it is the experience across the entire collaboration.”
ServicesPage.ctaBody: Let us accompany you in building a home that feels premium and unmistakably yours.

faqItems.question: How is design fee calculated?
faqItems.answer: At XPRESS DESIGN, design fees are based on usable floor area. The final figure depends on style (modern, classic, minimal…) and project complexity. We always provide a detailed quote and contract-scope clarity.

faqItems.question: How long does a full design package take?
faqItems.answer: Typically, a complete set — architecture, interiors and MEP — needs 45–60 working days. Timing varies with project scale and how quickly decisions are aligned between you and the architect.

faqItems.question: Do you take projects outside the city?
faqItems.answer: Yes, nationwide. For remote clients we combine online workflows with scheduled on-site surveys and supervision so execution stays true to the drawings.

faqItems.question: What about warranty and maintenance?
faqItems.answer: For turnkey builds we offer 2 years on interior finishes and up to 5 years on structural work. After the warranty window, we still support lifetime maintenance for returning clients at preferential rates.
